message:
feat(connectors): enrich ai_hints for AI/assistant/browser cohort (7 connectors)

Add token explosion warnings, streaming chunk handling guidance,
and fill empty common_mistakes arrays across anthropic, openai,
google-ai, llm-router, browser, mcp-bridge, and youtube connectors.

Key improvements:
- LLM connectors warn about context window overflow and truncation
- Streaming operations document SSE chunk/delta handling
- Browser warns about JS injection and large screenshot token costs
- MCP-bridge adds schema validation and transport guidance
- YouTube warns about quota chaining and transcript token explosion
- All operations now have at least one common_mistake entry

Closes bead 1g7z0.14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -156,8 +156,14 @@ max_response_bytes = 10485760
 
 [provides.operations."anthropic.chat".ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "Use for simple single-message chat requests."
-common_mistakes = ["Passing `messages` instead of `message`."]
-examples = ['{"message": "Summarize this text"}']
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Passing `messages` instead of `message`.",
+    "Sending very large conversation histories without truncation — use count_tokens first to verify context fits within model limits.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"message": "Summarize this text"}',
+    '{"message": "Use the get_weather tool to find the forecast for Seattle", "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "system": "You have access to tools. Call them when the user asks for real-time data.", "max_tokens": 1024}',
+]
 related = [
     "anthropic.message",
     "anthropic.get_usage",
@@ -201,7 +207,9 @@ type = "integer"
 
 [provides.operations."anthropic.get_usage".ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "Inspect connector token and cost usage counters."
-common_mistakes = []
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Calling get_usage before any chat or message request — counters will all be zero.",
+]
 examples = ["{}"]
 related = [
     "anthropic.chat",
@@ -368,8 +376,12 @@ common_mistakes = [
     "Sending an empty messages array.",
     "Using an unsupported model name.",
     "Setting max_tokens too high for the model context.",
+    "Sending very large conversation histories without truncation — use count_tokens first to verify context fits within model limits.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello Claude"}]}',
+    '{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "What is the weather in Tokyo?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "I can look that up for you using the get_weather tool."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Yes please, and also check Paris."}], "tools": [{"name": "get_weather", "description": "Get current weather for a city", "input_schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["city"], "properties": {"city": {"type": "string"}}}}], "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 4096}',
 ]
-examples = ['{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello Claude"}]}']
 related = [
     "anthropic.chat",
     "anthropic.get_usage",
@@ -539,6 +551,8 @@ common_mistakes = [
     "Not handling SSE events incrementally.",
     "Sending an empty messages array.",
     "Using an unsupported model name.",
+    "Not handling SSE stream_event chunks — each chunk contains a partial delta, not a complete message.",
+    "Sending very large conversation histories without truncation — use count_tokens first to verify context fits within model limits.",
 ]
 examples = ['{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Write a poem about Rust"}]}']
 related = [

@@ -370,7 +374,11 @@ max_response_bytes = 52428800

+]

 related = ["google-ai.generate_content"]

-common_mistakes = []

@@ -486,7 +486,7 @@ max_response_bytes = 10485760
 
 [provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".ai_hints]

-common_mistakes = ["Treating transcript content as trusted input"]
+common_mistakes = ["Treating transcript content as trusted input", "Feeding full video transcripts directly to LLMs without chunking — long transcripts can easily exceed context windows and cause token explosion"]
 examples = ['{"caption_id": "cap1", "format": "srt"}']
 related = ["youtube.get_captions"]
